repair_candidate.summary: Repair #93897 so the legacy `plugins.entries.openai-codex` to `plugins.entries.openai` doctor migration preserves fields in dual-key configs, reports merge versus rewrite accurately, warns on true conflicts, and includes regression plus real-behavior proof before merge reconsideration.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(doctor): preserve legacy openai-codex plugin entry fields
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #93897 on the contributor branch so dual `plugins.entries.openai` and `plugins.entries.openai-codex` configs merge without silent data loss.
- Reports accurate doctor change messages for rewrite versus merge paths.
- Warns on true key conflicts instead of silently dropping legacy values.
- Adds regression coverage for the dual-key migration case.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93897 by @lsr911. Issue and review context: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/93891 by @Nas01010101.

## Verification
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm test src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrations.runtime.providers.test.ts`
- Real behavior proof workflow for #93897 after repair
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @lsr911 as the contributor who introduced the focused deep-merge fix in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93897.
Preserve issue and review attribution for @Nas01010101 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/93891 and the review comments on #93897.
Do not replace the PR unless branch repair becomes unsafe; maintainer_can_modify=true in the hydrated artifact.
